onstart:
set -euo pipefail mkdir -p /workspace/postfiat-batch-replay-sglang cd /workspace/postfiat-batch-replay-sglang cat > index.html <<'HTML'

PostFiat Batch replay SGLang logs


HTML
python3 -m http.server 8080 --bind ${AAO_LOG_HOST:-0.0.0.0} > /workspace/postfiat-batch-replay-sglang/log-server.log 2>&1 &
echo "startup $(date -u)" | tee /workspace/postfiat-batch-replay-sglang/sglang.log
nvidia-smi 2>&1 | tee -a /workspace/postfiat-batch-replay-sglang/sglang.log || true
python3 -m sglang.launch_server \
  --model-path ${AAO_MODEL_ID:-Qwen/Qwen3.6-27B-FP8} \
  --served-model-name ${AAO_MODEL_ID:-Qwen/Qwen3.6-27B-FP8} \
  --host ${AAO_SGLANG_HOST:-0.0.0.0} \
  --port 8000 \
  --tp ${AAO_TP:-1} \
  --mem-fraction-static ${AAO_MEM_FRACTION:-0.75} \
  --chunked-prefill-size ${AAO_CHUNKED_PREFILL:-4096} \
  --max-running-requests ${AAO_MAX_REQS:-1} \
  --context-length ${AAO_CONTEXT_LENGTH:-32768} \
  --enable-deterministic-inference \
  --enable-metrics \
  --trust-remote-code \
  --reasoning-parser ${AAO_REASONING_PARSER:-qwen3} \
  ${AAO_EXTRA_SGLANG_ARGS:-} \
  >> /workspace/postfiat-batch-replay-sglang/sglang.log 2>&1 &
wait $!
label: postfiat-xrpl-batch-replay-h200-20260601
